message:
fix: harden worktree test isolation for metadata.json (bd-la2cl)

Add defense-in-depth against the test pollution that caused metadata.json
to revert to wrong Dolt server config (10.0.0.1:3309, mydb) in worktree
environments. The primary fix was in 63544a5e; this adds:

- Regression test TestSetDoltConfigWorktreeIsolation to catch future leaks
- Missing BEADS_DIR guard in TestTrackBdVersion_SameVersion
- beads_dir field in dolt-config.log audit entries for debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
